channel.title: Quickly Build Optimized Big & Fast Data Pipelines Blog
channel.description: Quickly Build Optimized Big & Fast Data Pipelines Blog

item.title: Handling Dynamic Partitioning with Spark On BigQuery
item.description: When loading data into BigQuery, you may want to:
item.content:encoded:
When loading data into BigQuery, you may want to:

  • Overwrite all the existing data and replace it with the incoming data.
  • Append

item.title: Bonjour
item.description: Pipelining fast data is big. Pipelining big data fast is bigger. :)
item.content:encoded: Pipelining fast data is big. Pipelining big data fast is bigger. :)
